records.ety: [Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ an art, probably from the same root as <?/, <?/, to bring forth, produce, and perhaps akin to E. text: cf. F. technique.]

defs: Of or pertaining to the useful or mechanic arts, or to any science, business, or the like; specially appropriate to any art, science, or business; as, the words of an indictment must be technical.
